app.name: A11yFred
app.tagline: AI-ayiwâk isi-ayâw, pakitahikâtew-atoskewina kâ-kanâcihtât tipiskohk masinahikanihk ohci kîkway kâ-kanâcihtât
search.label: Wihtamaw tânisi kâ-wâpahaman
search.placeholder: tapiskôc: modal kîskinamawew-âpacihcikana, namôya wîhowin kâ-takohtêw
search.hint_submit: Masinahika mîna itôtam Nâtamihk askihkos Enter.
search.hint_voting: Vote results up or down to change their ranking — starred results always appear first.
results.no_results_announce: Namōya kīkwāy ohci '{query}'. Mēscipahtā pēyak isiyīhkāsow, kīkwāy ōhi, ahpō kotaka ē-itwēwin.
results.no_results_body: Mēscipahtā pēyak isiyīhkāsow (tapiskōc 'button'), kīkwāy ōhi (tapiskōc 'input'), ahpō kotaka ē-itwēwin.
detail.refine_hint_ai: Âcimowin tânisi kâ-âhcihcikâtêk êkwa AI ka-masinahikêw êkwa ka-wîhtam kîkway âhcihcikana ahpô tipahimowina. Âhci kîya AI model ahpô pôni-ayâ
detail.refine_hint_no_ai: Masinahika mîna wîhtam nikan. Kîsikaw IA
detail.refine_placeholder_no_ai: Isi-māsinahikē: "Tāpwēwina kā-kihci-āyimihcikātēkwāw ōhi kā-wāpahcikātēkwāw mēskanāhk Onboarding Flow kihci-askīhk. Kwayask wīyasotākosiwin awiyak ka-miskam anohc kā-pōni-tīpāpātahk."
detail.rewrite_aria: Tipahimowin sâkohta êkwa âhcihta tipinihkâtêwa AI ôhci
detail.confirm_reset_body: Misiwê kâ-kîsitahaman ôma masinahikan. Kâ-kîwêhtahaman kahkiyaw kâ-kîsitahaman ka-wêpinâw.
settings.heading: Kihci-masinahikan
settings.ai_enable_desc: Kîsitahikêw Âcimowinwa ôhci/ahpô Kâ-nôhtê-nakatastêw ohci kâ-isi-masinahaman AI Kâ-isi-âtotamân.
settings.privacy_body_1: Anohc, kahkiyaw kâ-tipiskâtêk mâna kâ-pêhikoyahk kâ-natawihitoyan localStorage ohci. Namôya kâ-kîwêhtamaw ahpô wâskitaskamik. Kâ-tipiskâtêk sâkaskihtam: isi-âpihtaw-kîsikâwi, pîkiskwêwin, platform kâ-nâh-nâtawêyihtamihk, Live Search isi-masinahikewin, AI kâ-isi-âpatisihtâw, API keys, kâ-âstêki, acâhkosak, kâ-tipiskâtêki, kâ-tipahaminawasôhk, kâ-kihci-pê-wâpahtihcik, kâ-isi-masinahikâtêki, tipiskohk kâ-kîsitahamânihk, ôhci kâ-nîkân-pê-mâmitonêyihtaman.
settings.privacy_body_2: API keys kâ-tipiskâtêwak kâ-natawihitoyan mâna ôhci kâ-kîwêhtamawak AI kâ-isi-âpatisihtâw. Namôya kâ-wâpamâwâw ahpô kâ-wî-pêhikonaw. Kâ-wêpinaman anohc AI isi-masinahikewin, ahpô kâ-kîsipahtahamihk kâ-tipiskâtêk ôma kâ-mâmitonêyihtaman.
settings.privacy_body_translations: UI kâ-isi-pîkiskwêstamâkosit ôhci kâ-isi-wîhtamâkosit AI ohci kâ-kîsitahikâtêw ôhci kêtahtawê kâ-wanihkêw. Namôya kâ-kîwêhtamaw ayisiyiniw kâ-isi-masinahikât, kâ-isi-masinahikâtêk, ahpô tipiskohk kâ-kîsitahamân.
settings.reduced_motion_note: Kâ-nâhcipayiw mâmitonêyihtamowin kâ-ayâw. Kâ-pimipayiw tapiskôc confetti kâ-nâhci-wêpinâw. Kâ-kîwêhtahamihk, pâh-pimipahta kâ-nâhcipayiw mâmitonêyihtamowin OS isi-miyo-ayân isi-masinahikewin.
notfound.heading: 404: Wâyawîtimihk kâ-wanihikêyan
notfound.body: Ôma kîkway askiy namôya atoskêw. Kîhtwâm itohtê kâ-mâci-isi-atoskâtêk askîhkân.
party.announce_full: Mîna-mêtawêwin kîsikaw! Masinahikêwin Comic Sans. Kîsikâwihikêwin nistam. Konfetti wâpahcikêwin pantalla ohci. Ratón cursor magic.
party.announce_reduced: Mîna-mêtawêwin kîsikaw! Masinahikêwin Comic Sans. Kîsikâwihikêwin nistam. Ratón cursor magic. Konfetti namôya kâ-ispayik.
kofi.title: Ko-fi widget
about.what_body: Ôma kâ-kanâcihtât ohci tipiskohk masinahikana. Natotaw tânisi kâ-wâpahaman, miskam âcimowin kâ-takohtêk, ê-masinahikâtêk ohci kâ-masinahaman.
about.what_wcag: Ôma kâ-tipiskâtêk WCAG 2.2 Level A ôhci AA, kâ-âpatisihtâw kahkiyaw ayisiyiniwak ôhci misiwê isi-miyo-ayân ôhci masinahikewin. Pitos Level AAA ohpimêwi-masinahikana isi-sâkaskihtamwak kâ-takahkimitohtâkosicik kâ-kanâcihtât ayisiyiniwak.
about.step_1_body: Masinahika kâ-wâpahcikawin — tipiyaw-isihcikêwin, kîsikâwihikêwin, mîna tânisi âpacihtâyin.
about.step_2_body: Âpacihtâ Priority Up/Priority Down kîkwayak kâ-ayâhk peyak masinahikanis ôhci kîkway kâ-itahkamikahk. Achahkos kâ-wâpahtihiht nîkân. Kapesîhkan kâ-kîmotahtahk.
about.step_3_body: Nato kâ-nâway kâ-pê-isi-wîhtamân. Ôhi waskitahamâkana kâ-isi-miyo-pêhtamihk.
about.step_4_body: Mîcisowin-masinahikanis iskweyâc itasinahike (e.g. "Global:") ahpô âpacihtâ AI kîkway ôhci kakêskimow itôtamowin.
about.feature_ai_body: Âpacihtâ AI ohci kâ-kîsitahaman kâ-kanâcihtât ôhci kâ-masinahaman. Pê-isi-âpacihtâ kâ-kîhtwâm-isi API key ohci Anthropic, OpenAI, ahpô Google. Kâ-ayâw kâ-natawihitoyan mâka namôya kâ-kîwêhtahamaw. Isi-masinahikâtêw
about.feature_languages_body: Ôma kâ-tipiskâtêk kâ-âpatisihtâw ayiwâk 50 pîkiskwêwina, sâkaskihtam RTL ohci kâ-isi-masinahikâtêk nistam ohci kîsikâw. Nitâhkamikon ôhci pîkiskwêwina, isi-pimâtisiwin, ôhci pîkiskwêwâtisiwin. Kahkiyaw ôki pîkiskwêwina isi-sâkaskihtamwak, pêyak-isi-mâmitonêyihtamowin, pêyak-isi-mâmitonêyihtamowin, pêyak-isi-wanihitowin. AI ôhci kâ-isi-kîsitahikâtêw, kiyâm mâmitonêyihtam. Kâ-isi-nôhtê-mâmitonêyihtamowin mêtoni sâkaskihtamâkan.
about.feature_a11y_body: WCAG 2.2 ohci kâ-osîhtâw. Sâkaskihtam kâ-masinahikâtêk mâmitonêyihtamowin, pimôhtêwin isi-pimipayiwin, kahkiyaw kâ-âsitahikâtêk, kâ-nâhcipayiw mâmitonêyihtamowin, ôhci kâ-sîpêskâk isi-âpihtaw-kîsikâwi wâpikwaniy.
about.coming_auth: Google mîna GitHub isi sign in gdam kîsikaw setting devices ohci.
about.coming_custom: Ohpimē tāpwēwina kā-ohci-māsinahikaman ēkwa kā-māyi-māsinahikaman, mihkwacihcikātēwa wīyasiwēwin-astotin kihci-askīhk.
about.coming_ai: IA providers: OpenAI, Google Gemini, mîna latlh.
settings.confirm_reset_all_body: API keys mîna kihci-masinahikan kahkiyaw wanihtâk. Namôya kîsikaw.
settings.unsaved_body: Ayâw kâ-namôya tipiskâtêk kâ-kîsitahamân. Tânisi kâ-nôhtê-isi-tôtaman?
settings.language_changed_announce: Pîkiskwêwin: Kîsitahikâtêw, tipahamaw Save mêkiwinis kâ-nôhtê-tipiskâtêk
results.vote_hint: Vote results up or down — higher-rated matches appear first. Star a result to always pin it to the top.
settings.voting_on: Vote controls are visible on each result.
about.step_5_body: Mâci-masinahikê ôhi kâ-wîhtamihk êkwa tânisi kâ-isi-osîhtânân waskitahamâkana kâ-pê-pimipayihk isi kâ-masinahikâtêk.
search.view_all_confirm_body: Ôma ka-wâpahtahikâtêw {count} ohpinamowina ôma peyak askîhk.
detail.revise_error_body: Kîkway pâstâhow âhcihcikanihk. Pîhcipayihta Sâkohta & Âhcihta Tipinihkâtêwa ka-kîsitâtân.
settings.api_key_error: Pâstâhow: API key kâ-nâtamiht ispî AI Assist kâ-âpacihtâhk.
error.heading: Kîkway Pâstâhow
error.body: Tāpwēwin-māsinahikānis ēkā kī-ohpimē-kīsihtāhk. Kī-mēskanāw wāpahta ēkwa
detail.revise_error_invalid_key: API key namawiya tâpwê ahpô kâ-ayâhk ({provider}). Kaskihtâ kîya key kiskeyihtamowina Settings ohc.
detail.revise_error_rate_limit: Rate limit kîsitâw ({provider}). Kiyâpic âpatan êkwa kîhtwâm mâtinân.
detail.revise_error_network_error: Namawiya internet kâ-ayât. Kaskihtâ kîya masinahikan êkwa kîhtwâm mâtinân.
settings.reset_all_announce: Kahkiyaw Isi-Masinahikewin Kîwêhtahikâtêw ôhci Kâ-Tipiskâtêk Wêpinâw.
about.what_body_2: Pêyakwan isi pê-isi-kiskinohamâtowin ka-isi-kâh-kîsihtânaw, mâka kayâs kâ-kî-mîcimisoyâhk ohci ôma mâmawinikêwin — ôta kwayask kika-isi-masinahikanânaw tânisi kâ-miyo-isi-wihtamihk, kâ-mâmawi-âhpô kâ-wî-kakwêcimisohk ohci WCAG. Natohtam ôta masinahikanêwi-kihci-maskihkiy kâ-WCAG-isi-masinahikâtêk, pêyak nato kâ-pê-isi-wâpamaman, tâpiskôc kâ-isi-tipiskâk kika-masinahikanânaw, êkwa miskam kâ-isi-osîhtânân.
error.announce: Kikway kâ-maci-isi-itôtahk. Kâ-miskahcikâtêk mamawôhkamâtowin môy kî-pê-nâtikâtêw. Kâ-mâmitonêyihtaman kî-wâpahtên cî tâpiskôc kâ-otinahk, mîna kîspin mâka maci-itôtahk, pêyakwan kîkway mâka maci-itôtahk.
about.sources_body: Entries are written in plain language, near-duplicates are consolidated, and each is aligned to a specific WCAG success criterion. Sources consulted include:
detail.copy_all_aria: Masinipayihtâ wîhtamowin êkwa kâ-nakataskâtêk kihtimâkêwin mâmawi
detail.copy_all_announce: [EN] Finding Details / Description and Possible Remediation Steps copied
detail.reset_all_fields_aria: Kîwêhtâhkân wîhtamowin êkwa kâ-nakataskâtêk kihtimâkêwin kâ-isi-nitawi-kîsihtâhk
detail.reset_all_fields_announce: [EN] Finding Details / Description and Possible Remediation Steps reset
detail.edit_lang_warning: Edits are session-only — switching language or finding will reset them.
edit.target_dialog_body: You're editing a finding while viewing it in {locale}.
edit.save_as_personal_desc: Stored locally on this device and private to you. Other languages will be AI-translated unless you edit them manually — translations only run during site maintenance.
edit.contribute_desc: Your edit will be queued for the maintainer to review before it becomes part of the shared corpus.
edit.scope_all_langs_desc: Other languages will be re-translated from the updated English on the next translation pass.
edit.personal_ai_warning: Only {locale} will be saved. Other languages will show AI-translated text. Translations are updated only during site maintenance.
edit.en_switch_dialog_body: Your {locale} version is saved. Here's the English version of the same finding. Make any edits and save, or skip to leave the English version unchanged.
settings.wcag_filter_desc: Show or hide entries introduced in each WCAG version.
results.copy_link_aria: [EN] Copy link to these search results
search.hint_pin: [EN] Pin any result to keep it at the top across all views.
about.feature_pinning_body: Pin any finding to keep it at the top across all searches and views. Use the priority arrows to rank others, star to float a finding to the very top, or archive to remove it from view.
settings.pinned_results_desc: Items you've pinned appear above all search results.
settings.agentic_mode_desc: AI will search your corpus to match your style and technical depth when rewriting.
detail.agentic_mode_help: AI searches the corpus to match your style and depth when rewriting
detail.agentic_mode_hint: AI will search the corpus to match your established style and technical depth
common.sponsored_body: Kîkwây kâ-wîhtamâkêhk ohci nânitaw itê ê-wî-pê-itôtamihk tipahimisowin asici kâ-atoskêhikêt ayisiyiniw. Kiyawâw tipahimisowina kâ-sâkihikâtêkwâw, namôya kâ-mâmistahikâtêk, namôya masinipêhikan, namôya algorithm.
onboarding.heading: Tânisi, pê-takohtatâ A11yFred
onboarding.confirm_body: Namôya kî-tahkonam tipiskâtôwin mâyaw. Mâci-sîpêhtâ anohc asici mâyi-atosk kâ-pê-ispayik?
onboarding.slide_1_body: Wîhtam kîkway kâ-wâpahtaman: kîkway ôhci isiyîhkâsow, kîkway kâ-isinâkwahk, ahpô WCAG kâ-miyopayihcikâtêk. Atoskêstamaw Platform asici WCAG Level kâ-tipahimisonânihk ê-nâway-isi-kîsihtân. Atoskêstamaw Narrow Results ê-sipwêhtatân tânisi kâ-wâpahcikâtêk. Kîkwâya wîhtamâkêwina kâ-misikamihk isi-tipahikâtêwak, êkwa kâ-isinâkwahk isi-tipahikâtêwak.
onboarding.slide_2_body: Atoskêstamaw Rank Up/Down ê-wî-tipahamihk kîkway kâ-ispayik. Achahkos ê-asamat kîkway ê-wî-kapêsihikot nistam. Pin ê-asamat kîkway ê-wî-ayât nistam ispî kâ-nânatawâpamihk.
onboarding.slide_3_body: Wīhtamāson kā-kiskēyihtamihk māskoch ē-wīhtat, WCAG ē-itohtēt, ē-ācimostat, ēkwa ē-wīhtamāsoyan kā-kīsisīhcikātēk. Meskocipata ohci-isīhcikēwin ē-mācihtāyan (tapiskōc 'Global:'). API Assist āpacihtā kā-māyipahtāyan tānisi kā-isi-masinahikēyan, ēkosi pakitinam kīkwāy pēyakwan ahpō māka Copy All āpacihtā kākī-omāmitonēyicikan.
search.hint_platform_native_caveat: Native app kâ-mâmawi-otinahk namôya ê-misi-kiskinohamâkêhk tâpiskôc wêb.
search.hint_ranking: Atoskêstamaw Rank Up/Down ê-wî-tipahamihk tânisi kîkwâya kâ-ispayik. Achahkos kîkway ê-wî-kapêsihtât nistam.
search.narrow_clear_and_reset_aria: Wîpison narrow filter asici kîwê-isi pimipayihtâ
search.view_all_confirm_pinned_one: Pêyak kîkway kâ-pin-astêw asici kahkiyaw ispîhk kâ-wâpahcikâtêk.
search.view_all_confirm_pinned: {count} kîkwâya kâ-pin-astêwak asici kahkiyaw ispîhk kâ-wâpahcikâtêkwâw.
search.view_all_confirm_starred_one: Pêyak kâ-achahkosiwit asici kahkiyaw ispîhk nistam kâ-wâpahcikâtêk.
search.view_all_confirm_starred: {count} kâ-achahkosiwicik asici kahkiyaw ispîhk nistam kâ-wâpahcikâtêkwâw.
search.view_all_confirm_archived_one: Pêyak kâ-masinahikâtêw asici kahkiyaw ispîhk mâyaw kîkwâya ohci kâ-wâpahcikâtêk.
search.view_all_confirm_archived: {count} ka-natohkêhtêki êkwa kâ-wîhtamâkawiyêk mâna kîkwây ohci pêyakwan kîspêwak kâ-nîhtâpahtamihk.
search.view_all_confirm_body_one: Kâ-wâpahtihiht pêyak kîkwây ôma pêyakwan askîwin.
results.sort_live_hint: Kâ-pimipayik mosci mâmitonêyihtamâkêwin ohci. Kîkwâya kâ-nîhtâpahtamihk kâ-kîhtwâm wâwêyêhcikâtêki mwêhci kâ-otatoskâtêk êkwa kâ-nâkatêyihtamihk.
results.sort_smart_info: Kîsikâhk wâwêyêhcikêwin kâ-ispayik kâ-miyosit kîkwây tâpiskôc anohc, êkwa kâ-wî-otat-ayamihcikâtêk tânisi ê-itêyihtamihk. Kâ-ahkotêki kîkwâya mâna ispimihk wâpahtamihk; kâ-natohkêhtêki kîkwâya mâna mâyiw ispayiw. Ôma kâ-mîcisowin wâwêyêhcikêwin.
results.sort_wcag_level_info: AAA kîkwâya mâna kâ-nîsokâtêki ôma ka-masinahikâtêk. Namôya kahkiyaw AAA kâ-pimipayik kîkwâya wâpahtamihk, êkwa kîkwâya kâ-isiyîhkâtêki AAA wîhtamâkêwin kâ-kihcêyihtâkosit tâpiskôc ê-kî-miyowâtisit tâpiskôc kâ-ati-sâkaskinamihk.
results.sort_popularity_info: Kâ-kîhtwâm-atoskâtamihk, kâ-wî-wâpahtêmakak kîkwâya ohci askîhk kahkiyaw kâ-nîhtâpahtamihk. Anohc, kâ-mêkwât-nîhtâpahtamihk kâ-masinahikâtêk kîkwây êkwa kâ-pêyakwâpamihk kâ-pîkiskwâtêk.
results.rank_hint: Kânêhkâsi kîkwâya iskwêyâc êkwa mâcîhk kâ-wâwêyêhcikâtêk. Ahkotê ê-ispimihk wâpahtamihk. Natohkêhta ka-kâponamihk. (Ka-kîhtwâm-âpacihtâw.)
results.unpin_from_search: Ôma kîkwây kâ-otastêw. Mâyiw wîhtamâkê kâ-natohkêhtâk mâmitonêyihtamâkêwini.
detail.discard_confirm_body: Pîhtokwêw kîkway kâ-miskawihk ohci kâ-wîhcikâtêk panel, êkwa kahkiyaw kâ-ati-kîsihtâyan namôya kâ-nakataskâtêk.
detail.ai_revision_hint: Nawasôn tâniwâ kâ-nakataskâtêk ohci checkboxes kâ-ispimihk, ohcihiwêwina masinahikan ôtê, êkwa AI kâ-masinahikêt ôhi kîkwaya. Kâ-nakataskâtêk AI model êkwa kâ-kîsikâhk, itohtê
detail.finding_note_hint: Ohcihiwêwina ôtê ayâhkân: ayânihk, tântê wîhtamowin, êkwa kîkway kâ-itôtamihk ohci. AI Assist kâ-pîhtokwêhk
detail.ai_revision_placeholder: kayâs. ôma mobile ohci, kîkway kâ-isi-wâpamihk tooltip
detail.finding_note_placeholder: kayâs. Sôhki wîhtamowin, kâ-miskawihk Onboarding flow ohci. Napêwi wîhtamowin kîkwaya kâ-wâpamihk kîkway kâ-kîsihtâhk.
detail.ai_revision_aria: Nakatân AI kâ-itisahamihk êkwa nakataskâtêw kâ-nawasôhk kîkwaya
detail.ai_revision_error_body: Kîkway wanisîw kâ-nakataskâtêhk. Kîskinwahamâkê Save & Nakataskâtêw Kâ-Nawasôhk kîkway kâ-ati-itôtamihk.
detail.ai_revision_error_invalid_key: Namôya tâpwêwin êkwa kâ-kîsihtâhk API key ({provider}). Kîkway nôhcihk wâpamêw Settings ohci.
detail.ai_revision_error_rate_limit: Rate limit kâ-tâpwêwihk ({provider}). Pahkihtân piko êkwa kîkway mîna itôtê.
detail.ai_revision_error_service_error: {provider} kâ-wîhcikâtêk wanisîw ({status}). Mîna itôtê peyak tipiskâw ohci.
detail.ai_revision_error_network_error: Namôya internet ohcihiwêwin. Kîkway ohcihiwêwin wâpamêw êkwa mîna itôtê.
help.take_tour_description: A11yFred tânisi itôtahk kâ-wîhtamâhk kâ-mâcîhk ohci kîkway kâ-wâpahtamihk, pîtos kâ-wîhtamâhk ohci.
help.step_1_body: Kâ-mâcî-masinahikêyan, kîkwây ohpimê-nâtamôwin kâ-wâpahkwak. Sîpîhtakowin kâ-nâtamihk Settings ohci pîyak Web ahpô Native App kâ-miskamihk (mihcêt web-ohci). +kîkwây ohci kâ-mâmawi-nâtamihk pîyak wîhtamawin, -kîkwây ohci kâ-wîpahikâtêk (mâka: keyboard +screen reader -wcag2.2).
help.step_2_body: Pîyak kâ-miskamihk Rank Up ahpô Rank Down pahkiswêwina ohci kâ-pîtosîhihk tânisi kâ-nâtamihk. Acâhkos kâ-mîskinahk ita mâmawi-nîkân kâ-nitawêyihtamihk. Pin kâ-atoskâtahk mâka kâ-nîkânîhihk kahkiyaw natamowinihk.
help.step_3_body: Miskam kîkwây kâ-wâpahkwak ohci kâ-miskamihk. Miskamôwina nâtamôwin kâ-ohpimê-isinâkwak, mâka tipiskôhk kâ-pimâtisihihk.
help.step_4_body: Meskocipata ohci-isīhcikēwin ē-mācihtāyan (tapiskōc 'Global:' ahpō 'Cart:'). Kīspin AI Assist ē-āpatisit, pakitinam kā-māmitonēyihtamihk Revision Notes ēkwa AI ka-māyipahtāw kā-kiskēyihtamihk ēkosi kā-isi-māmiskōtamihk.
help.step_5_body: Kîcîpah wîhtamawin ahpô miskam kîkwây kâ-kîsîhihtâhk ita spreadsheet ahpô masinahikawin ohci. Copy All ohci kîcîpah nîswaw kîkwây mâmawi.
help.shortcuts_note: Pahkiswêwina piko kâ-atoskâtêki kâ-otihtamihk miskamôwin-masinahikanis ohci. Atoskâta ohci kakwêkâ pimôhtêwin ahpô kâ-mîskinahk miskamôwina kâ-ati-wîpahikâtêk.
about.what_body_2_prefix: Piyisk kîkwây ohpimê-isinâkwak mâka mihcêt kâ-isinâkwak. Ôma atoskêwin kîkwây kâ-wîhtamâhk pîyak mâmawi ohci, kâ-pîtos masinahikawinihk ohci, êkwa kâ-kîsîhihtâhk AI ohci pîyak wîhtamawin, pîtos isinâkowin, kâ-kwêyâsk-kanawêyihtamihk, êkwa kâ-tipatêyihtamihk ohci
about.feature_agentic_body: Claude (Anthropic) kâ-atoskâtaman, kîkway Match Existing Style ohci pê-atoskâta. AI mâka nâtamêw sêmâk kâ-kî-masinahikâtêki pîtos isinâkosiwina ohci kâ-isi-wîhtamâhk, namôya piko kâ-kîsîhihtâhk kâ-pêyak miskamôwin.
about.examples_ath010_label: Kâ-Kanawêyihtamihk Wîhtamawin Isinâkowin Ohci, Namôya Kâ-Isi-Atoskâtahk
settings.party_confirm_body: Kîkwây mâmawi kâ-pîtos-isi-pimipayihk êkwa piko pêtâpan kâ-namôya-manitow-pimâtisiwihk.
settings.language_rhg_body_1: Ôma pîkiskwêwin AI ohci kâ-kîsîhihtâhk êkwa namôya Rohingya kâ-nîhiyawi-pîkiskwêcik ohci kâ-kanawêyihtamihk.
settings.language_rhg_body_2: Rohingya ayisiyiniwak kâ-mâmawi-kî-mâyatisihihk êkwa kâ-wêpinihk. Atoskâta ôma pîkiskwêwin kâ-kanawêyihtamihk, êkwa kâ-kwêyâsk-masinahikawinihk kâ-pê-mâmitonêyihtaman.
settings.platform_all_desc: Wâpahta kahkiyaw miskamôwina web, native apps, êkwa masinahikanis ohci.
settings.starred_results_desc: Starred ayisiyiniwak mōhci kīspin ispimihk, tānisi kā-starred-ihcik kī-itāpatan.
settings.archived_results_desc: Archived ayisiyiniwak mōhci ispīhcipayiw mīkiwāhp ohci itācimowinisa.
settings.rankings_desc: Ispimihk mīna mihcēt ranking kā-mīyiyan itācimowinisihk. Ispīhcīw kā-ranked-ihcik pēyakwan anohc, kā-nīkānīhk wāpahтāw mētawākaniwin.
